content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Yei Finance: Product Manager Anywhere in the World Management and Finance Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain </p> <p><strong>About the Project:</strong><br>Yei Finance is a decentralized, non-custodial money market protocol built on the Sei network, offering innovative and flexible financial solutions. Users benefit from competitive yield, can access over-collateralized or flash loans, and manage risk with advanced tools—all leveraging Sei’s speed and efficiency.</p><p></p><p>Clovis is the latest product by Yei Finance, achieving over $400M TVL at its peak, $5.5M in protocol revenue over the past year, and standing as the largest protocol on Sei. Yei also pioneered the first lending-boosted DEX on Sei, with YeiSwap compounding YeiLend yields to drive $230M+ monthly trading volume and $147M in cross-chain bridge flow. Now, Clovis will expand this model across multiple chains, aiming to become DeFi’s cross-chain prime brokerage layer, supported by top-tier partnerships.</p><p></p><p><strong>Who We Are:</strong></p><ul><li><p>A team of builders from leading Web3 organizations, including AAVE, Wormhole, Venus Labs, OKX, and more</p></li><li><p>Backed by investors such as Outlier Ventures, Manifold, DWF Ventures, and the Sei Foundation</p></li><li><p>Partnered with industry leaders like Circle, OKX Wallet, Binance Wallet, Frax, Stargate, and others</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>The Opportunity</strong><br>As the Product Manager for Clovis, you will own the full product lifecycle—discovery, design, execution, and growth—across Clovis’ modules: Clovis Market, Exchange, Transport, and Vault. You’ll operate at the intersection of engineering, design, data, business, and community, helping scale a platform that’s shaping the future of cross-chain DeFi.</p><p></p><p><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Define and drive the long-term product vision, strategy, and quarterly roadmaps for Clovis.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with engineering and design teams to deliver seamless cross-chain lending, liquidity, and asset management experiences.</p></li><li><p>Conduct market and user research to map journeys, identify pain points, and ensure product-market fit.</p></li><li><p>Draft clear user stories, technical specifications, and product documentation that empower engineering and protocol teams.</p></li><li><p>Coordinate engineering sprints and ensure timely execution across cross-functional teams (frontend, backend, smart contracts, data, design, risk).</p></li><li><p>Work with data teams to set up dashboards, monitor product performance (e.g., TVL, user retention, transaction success), and propose actionable improvements.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with risk teams to model economic implications, set protocol parameters, and maintain robust guardrails.</p></li><li><p>Cultivate partnerships, support integrations, and act as a Clovis advocate at industry and community events.</p></li><li><p>Oversee product releases, manage testing/QA processes, and own internal product excellence initiatives.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Startup-Oriented:</strong> Comfortable operating in fast-moving, ambiguous environments and taking ownership from day one.</p></li><li><p><strong>Mission-Driven:</strong> Motivated by building innovative DeFi products.</p></li><li><p><strong>Collaborative:</strong> Communicates clearly and works effectively across both synchronous and asynchronous teams.</p></li><li><p><strong>Product-Quality Focused:</strong> Cares deeply about user experience and the details that make a product exceptional.</p></li><li><p><strong>Autonomous:</strong> Able to manage your own time, priorities, and outcomes in a fully remote setup.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li><p>3+ years in product management with experience in DeFi or blockchain.</p></li><li><p>Strong understanding of lending, DEXs, cross-chain bridging, liquidity routing, and risk frameworks.</p></li><li><p>Proven record of shipping and scaling complex products.</p></li><li><p>Skilled in structured problem solving, research, and clear documentation.</p></li><li><p>Experience collaborating alongside engineering/design, and writing technical specifications.</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with data tools (e.g., SQL, Dune, Flipside, internal dashboards).</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication skills—capable of simplifying complex topics for diverse audiences.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Nice-to-haves:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience creating wireframes, process maps, and user flows.</p></li><li><p>Prior work in a remote or globally distributed team.</p></li><li><p>Contributions to open-source projects and/or DeFi ecosystems.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Offer:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Competitive salary and token allocation</p></li><li><p>Fully remote setup with autonomy and flexible hours</p></li><li><p>Direct opportunity to build products from 0→1 at scale</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Process:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Recruiter Screen</p></li><li><p>Hiring Manager Call</p></li><li><p>Technical Round</p></li><li><p>Final Interview with the Founder</p></li></ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/yei-finance-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/yei-finance-product-manager</a></p> Mon, 08 Jun 2026 20:31:06 +0000 Wed, 08 Jul 2026 Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote </p> <p>In this role, you will work on the product design of umbrelOS, some of our first-party umbrelOS apps, and the <a href="http://umbrel.com">umbrel.com</a> website.</p><p></p><p>We hope you:</p><ul><li><p>Like to spend your days staring at artboards in Figma</p></li><li><p>Are obsessed with creating delightful micro-interactions and animations</p></li><li><p>Are willing to throw away ideas if they're not great, and optimistic enough to keep hunting for new ones</p></li><li><p>Care about the details, maybe a bit too much (a pixel off ruins your sleep)</p>&
